original_image_tags: This is the reverse side or routing slip of a document, printed on pink paper. It features multiple stamped ink markings indicating receipt times and routing. The paper shows aging, with some spotting and a small handwritten mark in the lower right corner. Four hole-punch marks are visible along the top edge.

elements.description: Pink paper with four punch holes at the top and three blue ink stamps: 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT AUG 7 9 35 PM '47 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' at top center; 'RECEIVED 29 10 56 AM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' at center left; and 'RECEIVED AUG 8 5:37 AM '47 U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' at center right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the pink paper and four hole-punches at the top, but Description B provides specific quoted stamp text not present in the general Description A, which is a consistent detail addition rather than a contradiction.
